title: sophora tomentosa subsp. havanensis
intro: Sophora tomentosa subsp. havanensis, also known as Cuban sophora or havanensis sophora, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, native to Cuba and Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Sophora tomentosa subsp. havanensis include its potential to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and reduce pain. In herbal preparations, Sophora tomentosa subsp. havanensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
